_doc: Phase 1 sprite-ID manifest. Path values relative to project root. null = pending visual mapping from contact sheet (allowed during Phase 0-5; rejected in Phase 6 strict gate).
_workflow: 2) For each null entry below, locate the matching tile_NNNN.png in the contact sheet.
3) Replace null with a path string under sources[].root (e.g. "assets/sprites/kenney_tiny_dungeon/Tiles/tile_0084.png").
5) After Phase 1 ships: rerun with --strict in CI.
